^GSPC: S&P 500, benchmark index tracking 500 large US companies.
^DJI: Dow Jones Industrial Average, index of 30 major US blue chip companies.
^IXIC: Nasdaq Composite, technology heavy index of companies listed on Nasdaq.
^RUT: Russell 2000, index tracking small capitalization US companies.
^VIX: VIX, index measuring expected volatility of the US stock market.
^GDAXI: DAX 40, index of the largest publicly traded companies in Germany.
^FCHI: CAC 40, benchmark index of major French companies.
^FTSE: FTSE 100, index of the largest companies listed in London.
^N225: Nikkei 225, major stock market index in Japan.
^HSI: Hang Seng Index, benchmark stock market index in Hong Kong.
^AXJO: ASX 200, index of leading Australian companies.
^SSMI: SMI, Swiss Market Index tracking large Swiss companies.
^STOXX50E: Euro Stoxx 50, index of major eurozone corporations.
^GSPTSE: S&P/TSX Composite, main stock market index in Canada
ETH-USD: Ethereum, blockchain platform supporting smart contracts and decentralized applications.
SOL-USD: Solana, high speed blockchain used for decentralized applications.
BNB-USD: BNB, cryptocurrency powering the Binance ecosystem.
XRP-USD: XRP, cryptocurrency designed for international payments.
LTC-USD: Litecoin, early cryptocurrency designed for fast payments.
DOGE-USD: Dogecoin, meme based cryptocurrency originally created as a joke.
SHIB-USD: Shiba Inu, meme cryptocurrency inspired by Dogecoin.
PEPE-USD: Pepe, meme cryptocurrency based on internet culture.
WIF-USD: dogwifhat, meme coin operating on the Solana blockchain.
BONK-USD: Bonk, community driven meme coin on Solana.
ADA-USD: Cardano, blockchain platform focused on scalable smart contracts.
TRX-USD: TRON, blockchain platform for decentralized applications and content sharing.
DOT-USD: Polkadot, blockchain network connecting multiple blockchains.
LINK-USD: Chainlink, decentralized oracle network providing real world data to blockchains.
AVAX-USD: Avalanche, blockchain platform focused on decentralized finance.
NEAR-USD: NEAR Protocol, scalable blockchain for decentralized applications.
MATIC-USD: Polygon, scaling solution improving Ethereum performance.
EURUSD=X: EUR/USD, exchange rate between the euro and US dollar.
USDJPY=X: USD/JPY, exchange rate between the US dollar and Japanese yen.
GBPUSD=X: GBP/USD, exchange rate between the British pound and US dollar.
AUDUSD=X: AUD/USD, exchange rate between the Australian dollar and US dollar.
USDCAD=X: USD/CAD, exchange rate between the US dollar and Canadian dollar.
USDCHF=X: USD/CHF, exchange rate between the US dollar and Swiss franc.
NZDUSD=X: NZD/USD, exchange rate between the New Zealand dollar and US dollar.
EURJPY=X: EUR/JPY, exchange rate between the euro and Japanese yen.
GBPJPY=X: GBP/JPY, exchange rate between the British pound and Japanese yen.
EURGBP=X: EUR/GBP, exchange rate between the euro and British pound.
USDMXN=X: USD/MXN, exchange rate between the US dollar and Mexican peso.
USDINR=X: USD/INR, exchange rate between the US dollar and Indian rupee.
USDCNY=X: USD/CNY, exchange rate between the US dollar and Chinese yuan.
USDZAR=X: USD/ZAR, exchange rate between the US dollar and South African rand.
USDHKD=X: USD/HKD, exchange rate between the US dollar and Hong Kong dollar.
XAUUSD=X: Gold spot price quoted in US dollars.
CL=F: WTI crude oil futures, US benchmark oil price.
BZ=F: Brent crude oil futures, global oil price benchmark.

GOOGL: Alphabet, technology holding company owning Google.

META: Meta Platforms, company operating Facebook, Instagram and digital platforms.
TSLA: Tesla, electric vehicle and clean energy company.

LLY: Eli Lilly, pharmaceutical company developing medicines and therapies.

V: Visa, global digital payments network operator.
WMT: Walmart, the world’s largest retail chain.
UNH: UnitedHealth Group, major US health insurance and healthcare company.
ORCL: Oracle, enterprise software and cloud infrastructure company.
COST: Costco, membership based wholesale retail chain.

HD: Home Depot, home improvement retail company.
ADBE: Adobe, software company known for creative and design tools.

NKE: Nike, global sportswear and athletic footwear company.
NFLX: Netflix, streaming platform producing movies and series.

MU: Micron Technology, producer of memory and storage chips.
NOW: ServiceNow, enterprise cloud computing platform company.
PANW: Palo Alto Networks, cybersecurity software company.
SNPS: Synopsys, electronic design automation software company.
CDNS: Cadence Design Systems, semiconductor design software provider.

LRCX: Lam Research, supplier of semiconductor fabrication equipment.

BA: Boeing, aerospace manufacturer of commercial aircraft.

HON: Honeywell, industrial technology and aerospace company.
PEP: PepsiCo, multinational food and beverage company.
MCD: McDonald's, global fast food restaurant chain.

DIS: Disney, global entertainment and media company.
T: AT&T, telecommunications and media services company.
UBER: Uber Technologies, ride hailing and delivery platform.

SPY: SPDR S&P 500 ETF tracking the S&P 500 index.
QQQ: Invesco QQQ ETF tracking the Nasdaq 100 index.
DIA: SPDR Dow Jones Industrial Average ETF.
IWM: ETF tracking the Russell 2000 small cap index.
